project.name: GroundAtlas
project.summary: Source-grounded repository control plane for humans and agents.

surfaces.name: Published website
surfaces.description: GitHub Pages deployment target for the public landing page.

surfaces.name: Pages deployment workflow
surfaces.description: GitHub-owned static site deployment without repository secrets.

surfaces.name: GitHub Action gate
surfaces.description: Reusable composite action for ga update/audit/fleet CI gates after npm publish/readback.

commands.name: check
commands.purpose: Run the complete local validation and dogfooding suite.

commands.name: validate:github-action
commands.purpose: Validate the reusable GitHub Action gate contract and public boundary wording.

commands.name: smoke:github-action
commands.purpose: Run the reusable composite action against a packed tarball in a copied fixture repository.

commands.name: release:preflight
commands.purpose: Verify local release readiness before npm publication.

commands.name: dogfood:external
commands.purpose: Run a pre-npm, non-mutating source-checkout dogfood pilot against copied target repositories.

adoption.notes: GroundAtlas dogfoods its own vendor-neutral project control file while keeping generated .groundatlas output non-authoritative.
